file_name: SPIENERGYCO,LTD_07_10_2014-EX-10-Cooperation Agreement of 50MWp Photovoltaic Grid-connected Power Generation Project in Yangqiao of~1.txt

perturbation.original_text:
Party A: People's Government of Fenyi County
Party B: Xinyu Xinwei New Energy Co., Ltd.
perturbation.changed_text:
Party A: People's Government of Fenyi County, hereinafter referred to as 'the County'
Party B: Xinyu Xinwei New Energy Co., Ltd., hereinafter referred to as 'the Investor'
perturbation.explanation: Introducing the terms 'the County' for Party A and 'the Investor' for Party B but failing to consistently use them throughout the document creates confusion. It is not clear if other references to 'Party A' and 'Party B' are implicitly referring to 'the County' and 'the Investor', especially when those references pertain to specific obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: I. Party A supports and guarantees the project construction and development of Party B, and will provide the most preferential policies and all- round service in the aspects of preliminary work, construction and grid-connected of the project, and actively coordinate relevant departments and units to help Party B accelerate project construction progress. Party B will give full play to the advantages in funds, talents, technologies, and etc. to accelerate the preliminary work progress of the project, ensure the early commencement of the project and produce benefits upon early completion.
perturbation.justification: The modified text introduces 'the County' and 'the Investor' as alternative terms for Party A and Party B, respectively. The contradicted text continues to use 'Party A' and 'Party B'. This creates ambiguity because it is unclear if the obligations described in the contradicted text apply to 'the County' and 'the Investor'. Specifically, the sentence 'Party A supports and guarantees the project construction and development of Party B' becomes unclear. Does 'the County' now support and guarantee the project? Or does 'Party A' only do so in its original designation? This misalignment of terminology, as defined in the 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' definition, leads to an in-text contradiction that could create confusion and potentially impact the enforceability of the contract.

perturbation.original_text: Party A supports and guarantees the project construction and development of Party B, and will provide the most preferential policies and all- round service in the aspects of preliminary work, construction and grid-connected of the project, and actively coordinate relevant departments and units to help Party B accelerate project construction progress. Party B will give full play to the advantages in funds, talents, technologies, and etc. to accelerate the preliminary work progress of the project, ensure the early commencement of the project and produce benefits upon early completion.
perturbation.changed_text: The County supports and guarantees the project construction and development of the Beneficiary, and will provide favorable policies and service in the aspects of project preparation, construction and grid-connection, and will coordinate departments to help the Beneficiary accelerate project construction progress. The Beneficiary will utilize its advantages to accelerate the project's preliminary work and ensure its early completion and produce benefits.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Party A' to 'the County' and 'Party B' to 'the Beneficiary' only in Section I creates an internal contradiction. The agreement now uses four different terms (Party A, The County, Party B, The Beneficiary) interchangeably to refer to the same entities, and it's not clearly defined if all following sections would also apply the change. This introduces ambiguity in understanding who bears what obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: II. As required by Party B building PV grid-connected power station project, Party A accepts the Cooperation Agreement of 50MWp Photovoltaic Grid-connected Power Generation Project in Yangqiao Town of Fenyi County signed by Party B and Yangqiao Town of Fenyi County, and actively coordinates Yangqiao Town to perform relevant responsibilities.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Party A' to 'The County' and 'Party B' to 'The Beneficiary' in the first section creates a contradiction with Section II, which still refers to 'Party A' and 'Party B'. This misalignment of terminology, as defined in the 'Misaligned Terminology' perturbation definition, leads to confusion about the roles and responsibilities of each party. Section II states 'As required by Party B building PV grid-connected power station project, Party A accepts...' but the first section now uses 'The County' and 'The Beneficiary', creating ambiguity about who these terms refer to in the context of Section II. This directly contradicts the clarity expected in contract terminology.

perturbation.original_text: Party B promises that land nature will not be changed for building large-scale PV grid-connected power generation project in the plot; comprehensive development will be carried out according to relevant national stipulations, such commercial crops will be interplanted as agriculture and forestry as well as medicinal materials; local employees will enjoy the priority to be employed; local building materials will be adopted and relevant expenses will be paid on schedule.
perturbation.changed_text: The Investor assures that the land will not be repurposed for the PV project, and the project will follow the development guide lines, with commercial crops interplanted between panels; local workers will be hired, local materials used, and payments made punctually.
perturbation.explanation: Substituting 'Party B' with 'The Investor', 'large-scale PV grid-connected power generation project' with 'PV project', 'comprehensive development will be carried out according to relevant national stipulations, such commercial crops will be interplanted as agriculture and forestry as well as medicinal materials; local employees will enjoy the priority to be employed; local building materials will be adopted and relevant expenses will be paid on schedule.' with 'the project will follow the development guide lines, with commercial crops interplanted between panels; local workers will be hired, local materials used, and payments made punctually.' only in Section IV without defining if the new terms and phrases are the equivalent of the old ones is a contradiction. This makes it unclear who has the legal obligations, and to what extent.
perturbation.contradicted_text: V. Party B will register a foreign-funded company in Fenyi County before implementing the project; Party A will offer all the preferential policies to the company as per local investment promotion policies for foreign investment introduction.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces 'Party B' with 'The Investor' in Section IV. However, Section V refers specifically to 'Party B' registering a foreign-funded company. Because 'Party B' and 'The Investor' are used interchangeably without a clear definition, it is now unclear who is responsible for registering the company. This creates a contradiction as the obligations become ambiguous. The explanation provided highlights the legal obligations that arise from this ambiguity.
